Off Calendar Jul-15-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Marc L. Sherman, Esq. of MCLENNON LAW GROUP 394-6688, for plaintiff/cross-defendant Timec Acquisition Co., Inc., demurring party
Katy A. Nelson, Esq. of BARBANEL & TREUER 310/282-8088, for defendant/cross-complainant and opposing party General Star Indemnity Co.

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- CROSS-DEFENDANT TIMEC ACQUISITION COMPANY, INC.'S DEMURRER TO CROSS-COMPLAINT -- sustained without leave to amend. Barred by release and Ins. Code section 650. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (REQ/301/EH) Reporter: Susan K. Crozier, CSR # 4761

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-06-2003 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Alan H. Barbanel, Esq. of BARBANEL & TREUER 310/282-8088, for defendant General Star Indemnity Co., demurring party

RULING:
Counsel did not notify the opposing party of his intention to appear for argument. Tentative ruling adopted -- DEFENDANT GENERAL STAR INDEMNITY COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO
COMPLAINT -- Overruled; Defendant has 10 days leave to answer. (DAG/301/EH) Reporter:
Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780
